channel.title: db - Tag - Huka's Garden

item.title: Postgres
item.author: Author
item.description: docker run --name postgres-sandbox -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=postgres-sandbox -p 5432:5432 -d postgres The default postgres user and database are created in the entrypoint with initdb. docker exec -it postgres-sandbox psql -U POSTGRES_USERNAME Reference How to tune PostgreSQL for memory | EDBstar PGTune - calculate configuration for PostgreSQL based on the maximum performance for a given hardware configuration Indexing for full text search in PostgreSQL - Compose ArticlesCompose PostgreSQL: Documentation: 13: Chapter 12.
